# Compute tiled n-gram hash indices

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This Engram translation keeps lookup, gating, or gradient work in typed tiles.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/engram/engram_hash_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/engram/engram_hash_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="engram_hash_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
template <int NumTokens, int MaxNgramSize, int NumEmbedPerNgram, int TileN = 8>
void engram_hash_layer(std::int32_t *ngram_token_ids,
                       const std::int64_t *multipliers,
                       const std::int32_t *vocab_sizes,
                       const std::int32_t *offsets,
                       std::int32_t *output) {
    static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && MaxNgramSize > 0 && NumEmbedPerNgram > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(MaxNgramSize % 8 == 0, "MaxNgramSize must be multiple of 8");
    static_assert(TileN % 8 == 0, "TileN must be multiple of 8");
    constexpr int kNumOutCols = (MaxNgramSize - 1) * NumEmbedPerNgram;
    static_assert(kNumOutCols % 8 == 0, "num_out_cols must be multiple of 8");
    constexpr int kTN = NumTokens / TileN;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm_id  = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, MaxNgramSize>>;
    using gm_out = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, kNumOutCols>>;
    using tile_v = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileN, 1>;
    using it_id  = global_iterator<gm_id,  tile_v>;
    using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_v>;
    it_id id_iter(ngram_token_ids); it_out out_iter(output);

    for (int tn = 0; tn < kTN; ++tn) {
        tile_v hash, idn, prod, mod, outc;
        TEXPANDS(hash, 0);
        for (int n = 0; n < MaxNgramSize; ++n) {
            auto gid = id_iter(tn, n);
            TLOAD(idn, gid);
            TMULS(prod, idn, static_cast<std::int32_t>(multipliers[n]));
            TXOR(hash, hash, prod);
            if (n > 0) {
                for (int j = 0; j < NumEmbedPerNgram; ++j) {
                    int col = (n - 1) * NumEmbedPerNgram + j;
                    std::int32_t vocab = vocab_sizes[(n - 1) * NumEmbedPerNgram + j];
                    std::int32_t off = offsets[col];
                    TREMS(mod, hash, vocab);
                    TADDS(outc, mod, off);
                    auto gout = out_iter(tn, col);
                    TSTORE(gout, outc);
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load the thread-owned token and weight fragments, apply the documented gate, hash, or reduction stages, then store the valid result region.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TADDS`](../../../intrinsics/tadds.md), [`TEXPANDS`](../../../intrinsics/texpands.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TMULS`](../../../intrinsics/tmuls.md), [`TREMS`](../../../intrinsics/trems.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md), [`TXOR`](../../../intrinsics/txor.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

The block partitions tokens across threads. Each active thread owns contiguous, non-overlapping token rows with at least 128 bytes of valid tile data.

## Memory and tile flow

Global tensor views feed thread-local tiles. Arithmetic and reductions create new tile versions before the final result is stored.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

    #ifndef SUPERNPU_ENGRAM_HASH_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_ENGRAM_HASH_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <int NumTokens, int MaxNgramSize, int NumEmbedPerNgram, int TileN = 8>
    void engram_hash_layer(std::int32_t *ngram_token_ids,
                           const std::int64_t *multipliers,
                           const std::int32_t *vocab_sizes,
                           const std::int32_t *offsets,
                           std::int32_t *output) {
        static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && MaxNgramSize > 0 && NumEmbedPerNgram > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(MaxNgramSize % 8 == 0, "MaxNgramSize must be multiple of 8");
        static_assert(TileN % 8 == 0, "TileN must be multiple of 8");
        constexpr int kNumOutCols = (MaxNgramSize - 1) * NumEmbedPerNgram;
        static_assert(kNumOutCols % 8 == 0, "num_out_cols must be multiple of 8");
        constexpr int kTN = NumTokens / TileN;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_id  = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, MaxNgramSize>>;
        using gm_out = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, kNumOutCols>>;
        using tile_v = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileN, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileN, 1>;
        using it_id  = global_iterator<gm_id,  tile_v>;
        using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_v>;
        it_id id_iter(ngram_token_ids); it_out out_iter(output);

        for (int tn = 0; tn < kTN; ++tn) {
            tile_v hash, idn, prod, mod, outc;
            TEXPANDS(hash, 0);
            for (int n = 0; n < MaxNgramSize; ++n) {
                auto gid = id_iter(tn, n);
                TLOAD(idn, gid);
                TMULS(prod, idn, static_cast<std::int32_t>(multipliers[n]));
                TXOR(hash, hash, prod);
                if (n > 0) {
                    for (int j = 0; j < NumEmbedPerNgram; ++j) {
                        int col = (n - 1) * NumEmbedPerNgram + j;
                        std::int32_t vocab = vocab_sizes[(n - 1) * NumEmbedPerNgram + j];
                        std::int32_t off = offsets[col];
                        TREMS(mod, hash, vocab);
                        TADDS(outc, mod, off);
                        auto gout = out_iter(tn, col);
                        TSTORE(gout, outc);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    }
    #endif
